snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: Man learns sentence after being convicted in death of child
snippet.description:

snippet.title: The Truth Behind Michael Jackson's Accusers Revealed: Unveiling a Complex Artist #shorts
snippet.description: He danced to his own drummer He saw things we don't see He heard things we don't hear He was a creative genius He was eccentric He was different And he was an artist I don't believe he was a molester for five seconds If we look at the history of this though the number of accusers Chandler Gavin Arvizo Wade Robson now Jimmy Safechuck are they all making it up Let's look at them individually Safechuck swore under penalty of perjury that he wasn't abused Robson swore under penalty of perjury that he wasn't abused Arvizo wasn't believed by the jury Two other people were paid off to end the litigation to end the lawsuit so he could get on with his career So where do you when you look at everyone under a microscope what do you really come up #shorts

snippet.title: Reactions Before the Executioner's Call
snippet.description:
Death row inmates reacting to death before execution

In order of appearance: 

Scott Dozier: convicted for brutal murder and dismemberment of 22 year old Jeremiah Miller in 2002. Jeremiah was Scott's drug associates. Scott killed himself after his execution was halted.

Patrick Murphy: executed for the murder of a police officer during a prison escape. 

Wayne Gacy: notorious serial killer and predator of 33 young men in Illinois. He was executed by lethal injection in 1994.

John Battaglia: was executed on account of murdering his six- and nine-year-old daughters in his apartment as ex-wife Mary Jean Pearl listened helplessly on the phone.

Billie Wayne Coble: executed nearly 30 years after murdering his wife's parents and brother.

Aileen Wuornos: prostitute turned serial killer, targeted and killed seven male clients in Florida. She was executed by lethal injection in 2002.

localized.description:

John Battaglia: was executed on account of murdering his six- and nine-year-old daughters in his apartment as ex-wife Mary Jean Pearl listened helplessly on the phone.

Billie Wayne Coble: executed nearly 30 years after murdering his wife's parents and brother.

Aileen Wuornos: prostitute turned serial killer, targeted and killed seven male clients in Florida. She was executed by lethal injection in 2002.
